profile.name: Alex Wijaya
profile.intro: Building scalable and responsive web systems oriented towards performance and business needs.

services.title: API Development
services.description: Designing fast, secure, and well-documented RESTful and GraphQL APIs using Node.js and Go.

services.title: Database Architecture
services.description: Relational and non-relational schema design and query optimization for high performance in PostgreSQL and MongoDB.

projects.title: Mobile Cashier App
projects.problem: Cashiers in the field often lose internet connection during transactions, resulting in unrecorded transactions and critical data loss for business operations.

architecture.description: An offline-first architecture synchronizing local SQLite with a centralized PostgreSQL server via a Redis-based queue.

gallery.description: Checkout Page: Fast cashier interface with smart product search.
Revenue Report: Real-time daily sales analytics chart.

codeHighlight.title: Offline Synchronization Logic
codeHighlight.description: Service worker and local queue to ensure transaction data redelivery once connection becomes stable.

challenges: Low-end mobile phone RAM running out of memory when processing tens of thousands of local product data.
Resolving duplicate transaction data conflicts during delayed synchronization.
results: Over 10,000 daily transactions successfully processed with zero data loss.
Transaction time reduced by 40% due to local product search capabilities.

projects.title: B2B Warehouse System
projects.problem: The legacy inventory system was slow loading pages with hundreds of thousands of items, dragging down packing efficiency at logistics warehouses.

architecture.description: Relational database optimization using smart indexing, query caching with Redis, and an efficient Go REST API.

gallery.description: Main Dashboard: Real-time stock statistics and low stock alerts.

codeHighlight.title: Optimized Paging SQL Query
codeHighlight.code:
SELECT id, name, sku, stock
FROM inventory_items
WHERE active = true
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 20 OFFSET 0; -- Terindeks berdasarkan created_at
codeHighlight.description: Indexing search and sorting columns ensures database response under 50ms even with 500,000+ records.

challenges: Real-time stock adjustment under concurrent input-output transaction loads.
results: Page load speed slashed from 8 seconds to under 1 second.
Boosted warehouse staff operational efficiency by 35%.

details: Led a team of 4 developers migrating monolithic systems to Go-based microservices.
Reduced API latency by 50% and slashed monthly cloud infrastructure bills by 20%.
Built over 15 responsive landing pages and maintained internal React admin dashboards.
Wrote automated tests using Jest, increasing overall code test coverage to 80%.

testimonial.quote: Alex has an exceptional ability to resolve system performance bottlenecks. His code is highly structured, well-documented, and extremely clean when shipped to production.
testimonial.author: Budi Santoso
